title: centaurea langei
intro: Centaurea langei, also known as Lange's knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Centaurea langei include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever, as well as its ability to act as a natural antioxidant. Centaurea langei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
